title: IFT-10
excerpt: Décimo vuelo de prueba integrado. Booster 16 y Ship 37. Primer despliegue exitoso de carga útil (8 simuladores Starlink) y amerizaje suave de ambas etapas.
excerpt_en: Tenth integrated flight test. Booster 16 and Ship 37. First successful payload deployment (8 Starlink simulators) and soft splashdown of both stages.

flight_data.result_booster: Amerizaje suave exitoso con experimento de motor deshabilitado
flight_data.result_booster_en: Successful soft splashdown with engine-out experiment
flight_data.result_ship: Amerizaje suave en el Índico tras despliegue de carga
flight_data.result_ship_en: Soft splashdown in Indian Ocean after payload deployment

milestones.event: Despegue exitoso y ascenso nominal sin fallos de motores
milestones.event_en: Successful liftoff and nominal ascent with no engine failures

milestones.event: Booster 16 completa experimento de aterrizaje con un motor deshabilitado
Primer despliegue exitoso de 8 simuladores de satélites Starlink
milestones.event_en: First successful deployment of 8 Starlink satellite simulators

milestones.event: Reentrada exitosa de Ship 37 a pesar de daños térmicos menores
milestones.event_en: Successful Ship 37 reentry despite minor thermal damage

milestones.event: Amerizaje controlado y suave de Ship 37 en el Océano Índico
milestones.event_en: Controlled and soft splashdown of Ship 37 in the Indian Ocean
